name: Chocolate-Dipped Strawmberries
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Strawberries with stems on (preferably a Long-stemmed variety), washed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread strawberries on a working surface with a wax-paper-covered tray nearby. You will also need one or two bamboo skewers or other picks.
2. In the top of a double boiler over hot water, melt the chocolate with the cooking oil, stirring to mix thoroughly. (The cooking oil will add a beautiful shine to the completed sweet.)
3. Place melted chocolate near the working surface, but keep it warm.
4. One at a time, insert the skewer in the stem end of a strawberry and dip into the chocolate. Lift out and shake off any excess chocolate back into the pot.
5. Place the strawberry on the wax paper and continue with the remaining berries. The strawberries should set for about 10 minutes before being served.
6. Chocolate-dipped strawberries can be refrigerated for up to 24 hours, during which time the chocolate will harden.
